query: What are the key shifts in portfolio construction for 2026 according to Goldman Sachs Asset Management?
report_title: Shifting Paradigms for Portfolio Construction in 2026 - Goldman Sachs Asset Management

source_pack.name: source_candidate
source_pack.source_description: Bloomberg, Goldman Sachs Global FICC & Equities data on US-listed active ETF AUM and flows

key_facts.claim: Global assets under management in active ETFs have grown by 46% annually since the start of 2020.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Check introductory section under Active ETFs for the statistic and footnote 1.
key_facts.fact: Global assets under management in active ETFs have grown by 46% annually since the start of 2020.

key_facts.claim: Active fixed income ETFs now account for 41% of total inflows to US-listed fixed income ETFs.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Look for second footnote under Fixed income opportunities section.
key_facts.fact: Active fixed income ETFs now account for 41% of total inflows to US-listed fixed income ETFs.

key_facts.claim: Derivative-income ETFs use options contracts to generate income from an equity portfolio, attracting investors seeking predictability in uncertain markets.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: See Derivative-income ETFs section, last paragraph.
key_facts.fact: Derivative-income ETFs use options contracts to generate income from an equity portfolio, attracting investors seeking predictability in uncertain markets.

key_facts.claim: A portion of private-equity outperformance can be captured in a public equity portfolio using sufficient data and understanding of PE investor selection methods, including sector tilts and leverage.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Refer to Private assets, public access section, third sentence.
key_facts.fact: A portion of private-equity outperformance can be captured in a public equity portfolio using sufficient data and understanding of PE investor selection methods, including sector tilts and leverage.

key_facts.claim: Expected central bank rate cuts in the US and elsewhere over the next year should benefit fixed income, including investment-grade credit and front-end US Treasuries.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: Check second paragraph of Fixed income opportunities.
key_facts.fact: Expected central bank rate cuts in the US and elsewhere over the next year should benefit fixed income, including investment-grade credit and front-end US Treasuries.

key_facts.claim: Active ETFs are viewed as an effective vehicle for markets with structural inefficiencies, combining active management with ETF structure benefits.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Important benchmark fact from the source report.
key_facts.verification_hint: First paragraph of Active ETFs section.
key_facts.fact: Active ETFs are viewed as an effective vehicle for markets with structural inefficiencies, combining active management with ETF structure benefits.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Claiming the report is silent on specific asset classes when fixed income, alternatives, and ETFs are discussed
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Misstating the publication date as 2026 instead of November 2025
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Referring to Goldman Sachs as a bank without clarifying Asset Management division
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.
